chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Ist Appeal No.53 of 2021 Mukesh Kumar Versus Nevat Mal and another DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.1887/2022. 2. For hearing of CMA No.1504/2022. 3. For order on Nazir Report dated 09.04.2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For hearing of CMA No.1226/2021..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 21.11.2023 None present..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Since last few dates appellant’s counsel is not appearing in the matter. He was called absent on 24.08.2023 followed by an order dated 19.10.2023 when no one was in attendance. Even today no one is in attendance on behalf of the appellant and there is no intimation either. The instant appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
